user.title: QR Login
user.description: Set up QR-based device login. Make sure your external URL is configured and served over HTTPS.

init.title: QR Login
init.description: Administrators can always approve logins. Non-admin users cannot approve anything — not even for themselves — unless you allowlist them below.

data.allow_cross_user: Allow admins to sign a device in as another user
data.allowed_users: Non-admin users allowed to approve (self only)
